# Traffic Control Insurance
> Specialized insurance for traffic control companies and flagging contractors working in live road construction zones.

## About
Contractors Choice Agency provides tailored insurance for traffic control and flagging contractors. Our former-contractor team understands the extreme liability exposure when protecting road construction workers from live traffic — and the DOT compliance requirements that come with it.

## Services
- General Liability Insurance
- Workers' Compensation (flaggers)
- Commercial Auto Insurance
- Umbrella/Excess Liability
- Equipment Coverage
- Occupational Accident Insurance

## Coverage Area
Licensed in all 50 states.
